response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The vocal tracks from IRyS's performance of 'BE MY FLAME' align perfectly with the reference lyrics, and her speech matches the post-performance announcements. 2. JSON Usage: The lyrics reference was utilized to confirm spelling and structure for the song portion, while manual transcription and translation were carried out for the announcement segment in both English and Japanese. 3. Timing & Pacing: Fixed the timestamp typo for the pre-order announcement block. Precise timing was applied, keeping subtitles active only during actual spoken/vocal parts. Segment lengths were managed carefully for readability during the rapid speech sections.

subtitles.original: Blazin' fire, show me your illusion
subtitles.english: Blazin' fire, show me your illusion

subtitles.original: It doesn't matter if it's real or a dream,
subtitles.english: It doesn't matter if it's real or a dream,

subtitles.original: Wild desire fueling my delusion,
subtitles.english: Wild desire fueling my delusion,

subtitles.original: So, how did you guys like my Birthday 3D Live?
subtitles.english: So, how did you guys like my Birthday 3D Live?

subtitles.original: We had so much going on from the new 3D outfit debut,
subtitles.english: We had so much going on from the new 3D outfit debut,

subtitles.original: new merch, to my first album announcement,
subtitles.english: new merch, to my first album announcement,

subtitles.original: solo live announcement,
subtitles.english: solo live announcement,

subtitles.original: and new song performances!
subtitles.english: and new song performances!

subtitles.original: I think it was packed with so much, so
subtitles.english: I think it was packed with so much, so

subtitles.original: I'd like to give you guys a recap and share the details.
subtitles.english: I'd like to give you guys a recap and share the details.

subtitles.original: ライブ本編どうでしたか？
subtitles.english: How did you guys like the main live performance?

subtitles.original: 色々ね、告知盛りだくさんだったと思うので、
subtitles.english: Since there were so many announcements,

subtitles.original: 改めておさらいと詳細をお伝えします。
subtitles.english: I'd like to go over them again and share the details.

subtitles.original: まずはグッズから！ First up, the merch!
subtitles.english: First up, the merchandise! First up, the merch!

subtitles.original: We have the Acrylic Diorama StandRyS, illustrated by Inunopiske-sensei,
subtitles.english: We have the Acrylic Diorama StandRyS, illustrated by Inunopiske-sensei,

subtitles.original: the ChibiRyS Tote Bag, illustrated by Lien-sensei,
subtitles.english: the ChibiRyS Tote Bag, illustrated by Lien-sensei,

subtitles.original: the Race QueenRyS Keychain, which is a really cute Race Queen plushie keychain,
subtitles.english: the Race QueenRyS Keychain, which is a really cute Race Queen plushie keychain,

subtitles.original: and the YabaiRyS Pouch.
subtitles.english: and the YabaiRyS Pouch.

subtitles.original: For full set bonuses, the limited edition includes a postcard with a handwritten message and a foil-stamped autograph.
subtitles.english: For full set bonuses, the limited edition includes a postcard with a handwritten message and a foil-stamped autograph.

subtitles.original: The standard version includes a postcard with both a foil-stamped message and autograph.
subtitles.english: The standard version includes a postcard with both a foil-stamped message and autograph.

subtitles.original: And sales will start at 1:15 PM, which is like real soon if not maybe even now.
subtitles.english: And sales will start at 1:15 PM, which is like real soon if not maybe even now.

subtitles.original: フルセットを買っていただいた方には、数量限定版は直筆メッセージ＆箔押し複製サイン入りポストカードが付いてきます。
subtitles.english: For those who purchase the full set, the limited edition includes a postcard with a handwritten message and a foil-stamped copy of my autograph.

subtitles.original: 通常バージョンは、箔押し複製サイン＆メッセージ入りポストカードになります。
subtitles.english: The standard version will include a postcard with a foil-stamped copy of my autograph and message.

subtitles.original: この後1時15分にカートオープンするよ！もうすぐだよね。
subtitles.english: The cart opens after this at 1:15 PM! That's really soon.

subtitles.original: 続いてアルバムです。Next up, the album!
subtitles.english: Next up is the album. Next up, the album!

subtitles.original: This time, it's being released in two formats: the CD and vinyl! Woohoo!
subtitles.english: This time, it's being released in two formats: the CD and vinyl! Woohoo!

subtitles.original: Pre-orders will begin also at 1:15 PM JST at the Hololive Production Official Shop, like real soon.
subtitles.english: Pre-orders will begin also at 1:15 PM JST at the Hololive Production Official Shop, like real soon.

subtitles.original: As for digital releases, that will happen on July 12th.
subtitles.english: As for digital releases, that will happen on July 12th.

subtitles.original: 今回はCDとレコードの2種類のリリースとなっておりまして、
subtitles.english: This time, it will be released in two formats, CD and vinyl,

subtitles.original: この後1時15分よりホロライブオフィシャルショップにて予約が開始されます。
subtitles.english: and pre-orders will begin after this at 1:15 PM JST at the Hololive Official Shop.

subtitles.original: デジタルリリースは7月12日です。
subtitles.english: The digital release will be on July 12th.

subtitles.original: CDにはここでしか聴けない「Gravity」のリアレンジバージョンとステッカー2種類、
subtitles.english: The CD comes with a re-arranged version of 'Gravity' that you can only hear here, and two types of stickers.

subtitles.original: レコードにはジャケットとアナザージャケットが印刷されたLPサイズ両面ポストカードが付いてきます。
subtitles.english: The vinyl comes with a double-sided LP-sized postcard with the cover jacket and alternate jacket printed on it.

subtitles.original: ポストカードじゃないよ、ポスターカード。もっとデカいです。
subtitles.english: It's not a postcard, it's a poster card. It's much bigger.

subtitles.original: さらに、こちらのポスターカードには、両面のどちらかに必ず直筆サインが入ります！
subtitles.english: Furthermore, one of the sides of this poster card will definitely be autographed by hand!

subtitles.original: サインされる面はランダムでございます。裏面かもしれないし、表面かもしれません。
subtitles.english: The signed side is random. It could be on the back, or the front.

subtitles.original: The CD will include an exclusive re-arranged version of Gravity and two types of stickers,
subtitles.english: The CD will include an exclusive re-arranged version of Gravity and two types of stickers,

subtitles.original: while the vinyl comes with a double-sided LP-sized poster card.
subtitles.english: while the vinyl comes with a double-sided LP-sized poster card.

subtitles.original: Yes, a pretty darn big poster card featuring both the main and alternate album covers.
subtitles.english: Yes, a pretty darn big poster card featuring both the main and alternate album covers.

subtitles.original: Plus, yes a big plus, one side of this poster card will definitely feature a hand-written autograph!
subtitles.english: Plus, yes a big plus, one side of this poster card will definitely feature a hand-written autograph!

subtitles.original: The signed side will be random, so it could be on either the alternate jacket side or the main album cover.
subtitles.english: The signed side will be random, so it could be on either the alternate jacket side or the main album cover.

subtitles.original: We'll see when you get it!
subtitles.english: We'll see when you get it!

subtitles.original: And BE MY FLAME, which was performed in today's 3D Live, will also be digitally released at midnight today, so don't forget to check it out.
subtitles.english: And BE MY FLAME, which was performed in today's 3D Live, will also be digitally released at midnight today, so don't forget to check it out.

subtitles.original: そしてライブでお披露目した『BE MY FLAME』は、24時にデジタルリリースもあるので、忘れずにチェックしてね！
subtitles.english: And 'BE MY FLAME', which was revealed in the live concert, will also be digitally released at midnight, so make sure to check it out!

subtitles.original: And there's more! That's right!
subtitles.english: And there's more! That's right!

subtitles.original: My first solo live concert! Woohoo!
subtitles.english: My first solo live concert! Woohoo!

subtitles.original: The venue will be...
subtitles.english: The venue will be...
